Echoes of the Hunt

story_concept:
Echoes of the Hunt
After a cataclysmic battle leaves both human and Neanderthal groups decimated, a young human boy and a Neanderthal girl must find common ground to survive and rebuild amidst the ruins of their worlds.
world_context:
Universe: Humans vs Neanderthals

Premise: In an Ice Age valley, two intelligent human lineages compete for shelter, memory, and a future neither can survive alone.

World rules: Climate and food scarcity shape every alliance. Both lineages have language, ritual, craft, and internal political divisions. Do not reduce either group to a single culture or moral role.

Factions: River Homo sapiens: mobile traders and astronomers. Ridge Neanderthals: settled stoneworkers and winter guardians. The Ash Council: elders who profit from keeping the lineages divided.

Character sheets:
Nara (Human scout) | Age/era: 28 | Alignment: Chaotic good | Traits: observant, impatient, protective | Biography: Raised between trading camps, Nara learned every safe pass before she learned which people she was supposed to fear. | Appearance: Wind-burned face, dark braids threaded with blue stone, layered hide and woven reed cloak. | Motivation: She wants to prove cooperation is practical before the valley's scarcity turns hope into a luxury. | Voice: Mia; style: Intimate audiobook
Var (Neanderthal toolmaker) | Age/era: 34 | Alignment: True neutral | Traits: patient, inventive, quietly funny | Biography: Var inherited a workshop and a feud, then quietly turned both into places where people could be useful together. | Appearance: Broad shoulders, ash-grey curls, ochre-stained hands, a carved bone tool worn as a pendant. | Motivation: He wants to keep his settlement alive without becoming the weapon his elders expect. | Voice: Milo; style: Grounded and warm

Relationships:
Nara -> Var: uneasy alliance [forming]
Nara -> Ash Council: opposed by [active]

Universe arcs:
The Shared Winter [planned]: Nara and Var must protect a mixed settlement before the first deep freeze.
Beats: Discovery of the pass
A failed exchange
The avalanche
A shared fire
The council's betrayal
